summary.shape_sentence: Opening gap/drive higher, followed by steady bullish trend extension into early afternoon, then controlled late-day pullback into a still-bullish close.

goat.note: Opening drive was the largest and cleanest expansion move of the RTH session.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels on this frame; bearish pivots acted as brief pullbacks inside the larger bullish structure.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels on this frame; bullish behavior appeared through repeated higher-low defenses.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Morning supply around 26140-26180 was broken; upper supply near 26220-26240 was respected into the afternoon high.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 26050-26090 held after the open, and higher demand around 26155-26180 supported the trend until the late fade.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was consolidating above the opening drive base around 26080-26110.
time_markers.12pm_red: Midday remained constructive near the upper half of the session around 26170-26190.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon structure was still bullish near 26190 before the final push toward HOD.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close faded from the afternoon high but remained well above the open, confirming a green session.

tags.banks_respected: demand held after opening drive; upper supply respected near HOD
tags.banks_broken: morning supply zones broken during trend continuation

takeaway: Bullish opening-drive trend day with sustained higher-low structure, afternoon HOD, and a late pullback that weakened the close but did not erase the bullish session profile.
